## Core Principles
Matter as fundamental; physical processes generate mental; reductionism; mechanistic causation; naturalism

## Application
Explain phenomena through material processes; reduce mental to physical; mechanistic explanations; naturalistic worldview

## Key Values
- Material primacy
- Physical reduction
- Mechanism
- Naturalism
